allow: Bash(bunx @biomejs/biome check --write src/components/matrix/Message.tsx src/components/matrix/MatrixProvider.tsx src/lib/matrix/types.ts src/lib/matrix/hooks/useTimeline.ts src/lib/matrix/hooks/useCall.ts src/lib/matrix/hooks/useCrossSigning.ts)

Bash(node -e "let d=''''''''; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{ const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(''''version:'''', p.version\); const deps=p.dependencies||{}; const rtc=Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k=>/livekit|rtc|call|voip/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(''''rtc/call deps:'''', rtc\); console.log\(''''first 40 deps:'''', Object.keys\(deps\).slice\(0,40\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''''''''; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{ const p=JSON.parse\(d\); const vers=Object.keys\(p.versions||{}\); console.log\(''''latest:'''', p[''''dist-tags'''']?.latest\); console.log\(''''last 5 versions:'''', vers.slice\(-5\)\); }\)")
